prompts.prompt: Write a single-sentence headline (max 12 words) for a product launch where a UK payments startup announces a fee cut for small businesses.
Write a single-sentence headline (max 12 words) for a hospital opening a new outpatient mental-health clinic for teenagers.
In two sentences, explain to a non-technical reader what "latency" means in the context of a web API.
In two sentences, explain to a non-technical reader what a "hash function" is and why passwords are usually stored as hashes rather than as plain text.
A founder has $150k to either hire one senior engineer or three junior engineers for a year. Give a recommendation in one paragraph.
A regional bookshop must pick one focus for the year: stronger e-commerce, or a programme of in-store author events. Recommend one, with reasoning.
A 30-person SaaS company must pick one: spend this quarter building a native mobile app, or rebuilding the marketing site and SEO funnel. Recommend one, with reasoning.
A local gym has lost 20% of members over 18 months. Should they invest in a refurbishment of the main floor or in hiring two additional full-time coaches? Recommend one, with reasoning.
A Python service must process 1M small JSON files on one VM. Recommend asyncio or a process pool, with one paragraph of reasoning.
An internal tool will serve ~50 users with light CRUD traffic. PostgreSQL or SQLite? One paragraph.
A small team is picking a background-job runner for a new Django app: Celery with Redis, or Postgres-backed job queue via django-q2? Recommend one, with reasoning.
A startup is choosing a frontend framework for a content-heavy marketing site that also needs a small authenticated dashboard: Next.js or Astro + a small React island? One paragraph.
Name three distinct primary causes of the 2008 financial crisis. One sentence on each.
Name three distinct structural factors behind the 1970s stagflation in the US and UK. One sentence on each.
Is it ethical for a company to use AI to monitor individual employee productivity? Take a clear position in one paragraph.
Should universities be allowed to use AI-detection tools to flag student submissions suspected of being AI-generated, given current false-positive rates? Take a clear position in one paragraph.
